column2:
Cognitive and Belief-based Responses
(Capture belief-based appraisals and judgments about the incentive, review, or reviewing situation)
column3: Social-relational Outcomes (Capture psychological responses that arise from social exchange, social recognition, relational expectations, or perceived connection with others)
column4: Personal Motivational Processes (Capture the quality, direction, and self-regulatory basis of reviewing motivation)
column5: Product, Brand, and Company Attitudes (Capture object-specific evaluative responses toward the product, brand, seller, company, or platform)
column6: Normative and Moral Evaluations (Capture judgments based on ethical, legal, fairness-related, or social-normative standards)
column7: Affective Responses (Capture positive and negative emotional reactions triggered by incentives or incentivized reviewing situations)
column8: Cost- and burden-related Outcome (Capture perceived burdens, effort, risks, and costs associated with reviewing or accepting an incentive)
